title: Stability midterm (Y-1) utilisation report 25/26
description: This dataset provides an indicative overview of the monthly utilisation of BMU’s with a Stability Y-1 contract - based on instructions provided by NESO’s Control Room. This file contains data for the year 2025-2026. The data includes the unit identifier (BMU-ID), start and cease times of instructions and the total utilisation time for each instructed period. Time values are all given in GMT.
